purpose: Standard structure for artists, designers, filmmakers, architects, sculptors, studios, and other design references studied by the ATLAS Design Academy.

fields.id: Unique ATLAS creator ID, such as ART-0001.
fields.name: Creator name.
fields.category: Primary category such as comic_artist, costume_designer, filmmaker, sculptor, fine_artist, concept_artist, studio.
fields.disciplines: List of disciplines connected to the creator.
fields.study_focus: What ATLAS should study from this creator.
fields.visual_principles: High-level design principles ATLAS can learn.
fields.shape_language: Forms, silhouettes, proportions, and visual structure.
fields.color_language: Color behavior, palette tendencies, lighting, mood, and contrast.
fields.materials_and_textures: Material lessons, surface finishes, clothing, mechanical, organic, or architectural textures.
fields.storytelling_methods: How the creator communicates story, emotion, culture, function, or world-building through design.
fields.atlas_applications: Where the AI Council can apply these lessons: robots, clothing, vehicles, architecture, HUD, branding, tools, products.

ai_role_relevance.minerva: How Minerva should use this profile.
ai_role_relevance.ajani: How Ajani should use this profile.
ai_role_relevance.hermes: How Hermes should use this profile.

fields.related_creators: Creators or studios that connect well with this profile.
fields.confidence: low, medium, high; indicates how confident ATLAS is in the current profile depth.
